traffic: Normal browsing with low request rate
label: Normal

traffic: 5 failed login attempts from same IP
label: BruteForce

traffic: Multiple failed logins followed by success
label: BruteForce

traffic: High traffic from single IP (500 req/sec)
label: DDoS

traffic: Login success at 2AM + unusual data download
label: DataExfiltration

traffic: Sudden spike to 2000 req/sec from bot-like pattern
label: DDoS
